context: Tests whether the agent uses current iOS 26 FinanceKit background delivery APIs and keeps sibling domains separate.

checklist.name: Availability and target
checklist.description: States that FinanceKit background delivery is iOS/iPadOS 26+ and uses a Background Delivery Extension target.

checklist.name: Entitlements and App Groups
checklist.description: Adds the FinanceKit entitlement to both app and extension targets and uses the same App Group for app, extension, and widget shared data.

checklist.name: Authorization inheritance
checklist.description: Notes that authorization is requested in the main app and inherited by the background delivery extension.

checklist.name: Data types and frequencies
checklist.description: Uses documented background data types such as `.transactions`, `.accountBalances`, and `.accounts` with `.hourly`, `.daily`, or `.weekly` update frequency.

checklist.name: Extension lifecycle
checklist.description: Implements async `didReceiveData(for:)` and `willTerminate()` on `BackgroundDeliveryExtension` and explains that returning from `didReceiveData` ends the extension's work.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps WidgetKit UI/timeline code, PassKit Apple Pay checkout, and order-tracking email optimization outside FinanceKit's core background delivery guidance.
